title: Hermes Agent Tutorial: How to Setup & Use Open Source AI Agent for Beginners
summary: Hermes Agent is an open-source AI agent framework with near 200K GitHub stars that runs locally on Mac or Windows. It integrates with Telegram, includes persistent memory, autonomous skill learning, and scheduled task execution like a morning news brief cron job.
writeup: This tutorial covers setting up and using Hermes Agent, an open-source AI agent framework with nearly 200K GitHub stars that runs locally on Mac or Windows without paid subscriptions. It walks through end-to-end installation, model selection via OpenRouter, and practical use cases. Key features include persistent memory, self-improvement through skill generation, Telegram integration, and cron job scheduling for task automation.
